scripts.mush:publish: echo 'TODO: mush publish not yet implemented'
scripts.lint: find src -name '*.mush' -print0 | xargs -0 npx rhost-testkit lint
scripts.lint:strict: find src -name '*.mush' -print0 | xargs -0 npx rhost-testkit lint --strict
scripts.validate: find src -name '*.mush' | while read f; do npx rhost-testkit validate --file "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.fmt: find src -name '*.mush' -print0 | xargs -0 npx rhost-testkit fmt
scripts.fmt:check: find src -name '*.mush' -print0 | xargs -0 npx rhost-testkit fmt --check
